item.title: AI This Week - May 2nd
item.description: This Article Was Written by AI ~ gizmodo. “Is your job safe from artificial intelligence? As a writer who depends on finding the right words for my own thoughts, I foolishly believed I might be relatively robot-proof” Meredith Dietz likes to hope that there are some areas of uniquely human creativity that can’t be produced by AI quite yet, only to realize that AI copywriting sites and bots have proved this wrong.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: The Blog for the AI Technologist of the 21st Century Helping you build Intelligent systems Keeping you abreast with the latest developments in AI Sharing insights on new technologies in AI Providing a front seat preview on conferences, webinars and workshops. Reviews of Courses, Books, Videos and Tutorials.
